LanguageData.AircraftStrikeSuccess: Air attack: Successful using {1} with {0} aircraft
LanguageData.NoAvailableAircraft: There are no aerial insects available: {0}
LanguageData.AircraftStrikeFailed: Aerial beast attack failure: {0} is not available for {1}
LanguageData.NoAircraftForStrike: There are no insects available for attack by {0}.
LanguageData.AircraftStatusTooltip: The state of the insect colony:
LanguageData.LaunchAircraftDesc: Commands an aerial beast to take off. Once taken off, a beast does not return to the ground and must be commanded by a towing species in order to use it.
LanguageData.TakeoffEffectMapNull: Unable to generate takeoff effect: parent map does not exist
LanguageData.TakeoffSkyfallerCreated: Create a take-off sky crasher with one stack of bio-liquefied fuel on {0}
LanguageData.TakeoffEffectError: Error occurred while generating takeoff effect: {0}
LanguageData.AddAircraftNullFaction: Attempted to add air units to the Sky faction
LanguageData.ARA_ToggleDropPodIntercept_Desc: Switches the interception mode for enemy drop pods descending by Heavenly Shades.
LanguageData.ARA_InterceptDropPod_NoAircraft: There are no Heavenly Shades of Beasts available.
LanguageData.ARA_InterceptDropPod_LetterLabel: Heavenly shaman species intercepts drop pod
LanguageData.ARA_InterceptDropPod_LetterText: The Heavenly Shrine species intercepted an enemy transport pod {0} aircraft in the air. The target was shot down and crashed to the ground in the form of a drop pod.
